data.last_assistant_message:
## Validation Report

### Source Code (AttachSmall.tsx)
- **TypeScript:** ✅ `tsc --noEmit` — no errors
- **ESLint:** ✅ — no warnings or errors
- **Committed:** ✅ `69e3bc5` (previous session)
- **Playwright test:** ⏳ Requires Claude Code restart — the whole point of this session was fixing the MCP config so the next restart works

### Playwright MCP Config Fix
- **Root cause found:** Plugin reads from cache at `~/.claude/plugins/cache/claude-plugins-official/playwright/b36fd4b75301/.mcp.json`, not from the `marketplaces/` source file we edited last session
- **Fix applied:** Added `--headless --isolated` to the active cache file
- **To verify:** Restart Claude Code → Playwright will use headless mode → no more Chrome single-instance conflict
